authors.author: Toni Hatch
Toni Hatch
Eines Tages hörte ich (Und Seine Liebe ist viel wärmer)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Something Happens When I call you Name Something Happens When I call you Name Something Happens When I call you Name Something Happens When I call you Name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mountains Move When I call you Name Mountains Move When I call you Name Mountains Move When I call you Name Something Happens When I call you Name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Chains are Loose When I call you Name Chains are Loose When I call you Name Chains are Loose When I call you Name Something Happens When I call you Name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We Break through When we call your Name We Break through When we call your Name We Break through When we call your Name Something Happens When I call you Name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Mountains Move Chains are Loose We Break through Something Happens When I call you Name :/ /: Mountains Move Chains are Loose We Break through Mountains Move Chains are Loose We Break through :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Right here We Break through (Right Now) We Break through /: Mountains Move Chains are Loose We Break through :/ (We Break through) We Break through
